text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ah, crap! Why has my forehead gone all red?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I must've eaten too many snacks. They were all so
cute, I couldn't just pick one...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
They were smaller than a cake, so I ended up
wolfing down a whole bunch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black seems to be suffering from skin
issues.
